title: Grain boundary energy affected initial oxidation behavior of Inconel 718
evidence_note: Used as a real source for grain-boundary-sensitive initial oxidation behavior in Inconel 718.

title: A simple and effective method to mitigate intergranular oxidation damage in additively manufactured IN625
evidence_note: Used as a real source for cerium coating effects on chromia-scale adherence and intergranular oxidation in AM IN625.

title: High-temperature oxidation performance of Ni-based GH3536 superalloy fabricated by laser powder bed fusion
evidence_note: Used as a real source for LPBF GH3536 oxidation behavior at 950 C and the role of cellular microstructure.

title: Creep Mechanism and Microstructure Evolution of a Directionally Solidified Nickel-Based Superalloy at 850 C
evidence_note: Used as a real source for orientation-dependent creep mechanisms, slip systems, and gamma-prime rafting at 850 C.

title: Creep Deformation and Damage Mechanisms of an Additively Manufactured Ni-Base Superalloy
evidence_note: Used as a real source for grain size, heat treatment, orientation, carbide growth, precipitate-free zones, and creep damage in ABD-900AM.

title: Influence of Rejuvenation Heat Treatment on Creep Property for Nickel-Based Directionally Solidified Superalloy
evidence_note: Used as a real source for rejuvenation heat treatment recovering creep life through gamma-prime morphology adjustment.

title: Phase-field-informed machine learning for creep strain prediction in nickel-based superalloys
evidence_note: Used as a real source for phase-field-informed machine learning features in creep strain prediction.
